author: Dexterity104
title: General multi-language smart-contract vulnerability miner
notes: A general high/critical vulnerability miner for the sn60__bitsec/miner lane. It ranks the project's own source across Solidity, Vyper, Rust, Move and Cairo, runs a triage pass that also picks audit targets, then deep contiguous and wide risk-windowed source audits, and supplements with model-free structural checks. Every finding is localized to an exact file and function with a concrete mechanism and impact. No project-specific or benchmark-specific content.
